description: Chart Pattern Scanner - daily S&P 500 scan for four technical setups: fresh 200-DMA cross-ups and cross-downs, double tops and double bottoms, each tagged CONFIRMED or FORMING. Companion to the protected Stock Screener; writes data/chart-patterns.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Chart Pattern Scanner - daily at 23:30 UTC, after the US close and EOD price settlement, so the 200-DMA crossovers and double top/bottom detections reflect the latest session.
